source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
The distance between the top of the cat that is sitting on the table to the top of the cat that is sleeping on the floor is $150 \mathrm{~cm}$. The distance from the top of the cat that is sleeping on the table to the top of the cat that is sitting on the floor is $110 \mathrm{~cm}$. How high is the table?
<image1>

image_dependency: Question is fully specified in text with numeric relations; no explicit visual or spatial reading from image is required
An image asset exists in the registry, but the prompt itself does not reference needing the picture
multi_step: The problem gives two distinct distance conditions that must be jointly combined
Solving requires forming relations between table height and two cat postures/heights, then eliminating variables
This is beyond single-step lookup and supports algebraic multi-step reasoning
verifiability: Multiple-choice options are provided, so the final answer has a constrained target form
The stated answer can be checked by solving the two equations implied by the text

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产均存在，registry_passed=true，资产完整性良好
虽然存在 image_present_but_problem_appears_text_sufficient 风险标记，但评分证据表明题目主要由文本完整承载核心语义，不影响收录
